# Pull Request

## Description

Please include a summary of your changes and the related issue if applicable.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] I have re-downloaded the repo and checked for conflicts before PR creation.
- [ ] All CI checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if required).
- [ ] Logging is implemented (for agent/automation changes).
- [ ] Changelog entry added (if changelog is reinstated).
- [ ] This PR adheres to the policies in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Related Issues

Fixes #
